query:
UPDATE threads
        SET status = $1,
            input_tokens = $2,
            cached_tokens = $3,
            output_tokens = $4,
            duration_ms = $5,
            ended_at = NOW(),
            iterations = COALESCE(
                (SELECT MAX(iteration_number)
                 FROM messages WHERE thread_id = $6),
                0
            ),
            terminal = true
        WHERE id = $7 AND NOT terminal
